column3: "Varuna supports eye health" refers to its role in maintaining good vision and protecting one's eyes from potential harm.
"Varuna reduces inflammation" refers to its ability to decrease swelling and pain associated with tissue or organ irritation.
"Varuna promotes joint flexibility and mobility" refers to its ability to enhance ease of movement in different parts of the body, particularly in areas where joints are present.
"Varuna boosts immune system" refers to its ability to enhance body's natural defenses against illnesses, leading to better health.
"Varuna enhances brain function" refers to its ability to improve mental processes and cognitive performance through specific substances or properties found within it.
"Varuna improves digestion" refers to its ability to enhance the body's capability to break down food and absorb nutrients, promoting better overall gut health.
"Varuna relieves headaches" refers to its ability to alleviate pain from headache problems naturally.
"Varuna lowers blood sugar levels" refers to its ability to help manage diabetes by reducing the glucose concentration in the blood.
"Varuna increases energy levels" refers to its ability to enhance or boost a person's vitality and stamina, making them feel more active.
"Varuna supports cardiovascular health" refers to its beneficial role on maintaining a healthy heart function, reducing risks of issues like heart diseases.
